source: reviewed/Ars Magica - Definitive Edition (Core Rules).md (Houses, Order & Society, covenant text)

elements.name: Archmagus
elements.summary: An ancient, immensely powerful magus rarely seen outside their sanctum.
elements.as_character: A formidable elder whose attention is itself a danger.

elements.name: Young magus
elements.summary: Recently Gauntleted, eager to prove themselves and build a reputation.
elements.wants: Make a name and secure resources.
elements.as_character: An eager, slightly reckless new magus.

elements.name: Quaesitor
elements.summary: A Guernicus-trained investigator empowered to judge crimes against the Code.
elements.wants: Enforce the Code and uncover the truth.
elements.as_character: A stern investigator who misses nothing.

elements.name: Hoplite
elements.summary: A combat-trained magus who enforces Hermetic law by force, backing the Quaesitores.
elements.wants: Bring lawbreakers to justice by force when needed.
elements.as_character: A battle-ready magus, weapon of the Tribunal.

elements.name: Redcap
elements.summary: An (often unGifted) Mercere messenger carrying news, letters, and vis between covenants.
elements.wants: Deliver reliably; be respected, not treated as a servant.
elements.as_character: A well-travelled courier full of Order news.

elements.name: Hedge wizard
elements.summary: A magus of an obscure Ex Miscellanea tradition, only nominally Hermetic.
elements.wants: Preserve and use a strange tradition.
elements.as_character: An eccentric wizard with non-standard powers.

elements.name: Verditius crafter
elements.summary: A proud enchanter selling magical items, prone to long vendettas.
elements.wants: Craft the finest items and best rivals.
elements.as_character: A proud item-maker with a grudge.

elements.name: Suspected diabolist
elements.summary: A magus rumored to deal with demons, shadowed by Quaesitorial suspicion.
elements.wants: Hide the truth — innocent or damned.
elements.as_character: A magus under a cloud of dread rumor.

elements.name: Covenant grog-captain
elements.summary: The veteran soldier commanding the covenant's mercenary guards (grogs).
elements.wants: Keep the turb sharp and the covenant defended.
elements.as_character: A blunt, capable veteran the grogs follow.

elements.name: Covenant steward / autocrat
elements.summary: The mundane administrator running the covenant's daily affairs and finances.
elements.wants: Keep the covenant solvent and orderly.
elements.as_character: A harried, indispensable manager of covenant life.

elements.name: Mundane lord or cleric
elements.summary: A noble, bishop, or abbot whose lands or law entangle the covenant.
elements.wants: Land, heirs, prestige, or souls and orthodoxy.
elements.as_character: A powerful mundane wary of the unsettling wizards.

elements.name: Faerie-touched peasant
elements.summary: A local villager marked by the fae; useful, unreliable, quietly dangerous.
elements.wants: Survive between the covenant and the fae.
elements.as_character: A villager who knows too much about the wood.
